text:
ALZ_MEDICARE_EVER Alzheimer's Disease - Medicare Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 ALZ_MEDICAID_EVER Alzheimer's Disease - Medicaid Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 ALZRDSD_COMBINED Alzheimer's or Related Dementia - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
 ALZRDSD_MEDICARE Alzheimer's or Related Dementia - Medicare Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not
